headline: SPCX Stock: SpaceX's Wireless Ambitions Fuel T-Mobile Acquisition Speculation
summary: A TD Cowen analyst suggested SpaceX's Starlink unit could look to acquire a major U.S. wireless carrier like T-Mobile to secure the infrastructure needed for its suburban and urban mobile broadband ambitions.

raw.headline: SPCX Stock: SpaceX's Wireless Ambitions Fuel T-Mobile Acquisition Speculation
raw.summary: A TD Cowen analyst suggested SpaceX's Starlink unit could look to acquire a major U.S. wireless carrier like T-Mobile to secure the infrastructure needed for its suburban and urban mobile broadband ambitions.

headline: T-Mobile to Host Q2 2026 Earnings Call on July 23, 2026
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., June 25, 2026--T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) looks forward to discussing second quarter 2026 financial and operational results on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The call will be accessible via dial-in with pre-registration as well as a webcast link on the Company’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.t-mobile.com. The earnings release, Investor Factbook, and other related materials will be available at approximately 6:30 a.m. ET on Thursda

headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX Could Acquire T-Mobile In Wireless Push, Says Analyst
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX could acquire a U.S. wireless services provider, with T-Mobile the most likely target, speculated a TD Cowen analyst.

raw.headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX Could Acquire T-Mobile In Wireless Push, Says Analyst
raw.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX could acquire a U.S. wireless services provider, with T-Mobile the most likely target, speculated a TD Cowen analyst.

headline: Germany's $125 Billion Deal Boom Puts M&A Back in Focus
summary: German companies' announced deals could mark the third-busiest first half in 20 years.

headline: T-Mobile Completes Landmark Hometown Grants Initiative, Transforming 500 Communities
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., June 25, 2026--T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) today announced the final 26 recipients of its Hometown Grants program, marking a major milestone for the initiative. Since launching in April 2021, T-Mobile has invested more than $22.8 million to help fund 500 community development projects in small towns and rural communities across 49 states and Puerto Rico.

summary: With 85 hedge funds holding bullish positions and analysts seeing 44.40% upside potential, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) ranks among the top stocks to buy for financial stability. headline: AI chip market the 'hottest and riskiest' to play: Ray Wang
summary: Ray Wang, Principal Analyst & Founder of Constellation Research, analyses Micron's latest earnings. He says the world will be seeing memory shortage for the next 24 months, making the chip market the hottest and riskiest for trading.
